original_snippet_context: A list of messages congratulating Jorge Tibiriçá, president of the state of São Paulo, on the success of the Taubaté Convention.
relevant_quote: A Câmara Municipal felicita v. exa. pelo triumpho alcançado da installação da Caixa de Conversão.
justification: This is a statement of fact, congratulating the president on the successful establishment of the Caixa de Conversão.  No specific policy positions related to the Caixa are mentioned.
